title: Archive: ObsVLA / Camera-Space Action Track
description: Archive reason: OC-VLA already completes the standalone camera-space action-normalization topic; our live use is inside Cross-Embodiment Representations.
summary: Observation-centric action prediction is archived as its own card because camera-space action grounding is now a concrete paper direction, not an independent dashboard project for us.

details.text: OC-VLA grounds end-effector actions in camera observation coordinates using camera extrinsics, improving cross-view generalization while staying plug-compatible with existing VLA architectures. This is exactly the standalone ObsVLA idea.

links.label: OC-VLA / Grounding Actions in Camera Space

details: Moved-out live work: Cross-Embodiment Representations should compare camera-frame actions against latent actions, object/contact heatmaps, and RGB+XYZ on one HOI/UMI task.
Archive decision: do not create a second Survey card for camera-frame action unless we implement a concrete baseline on our data.
risks_decisions: Reason type: paper completed the core topic; remaining value is an evaluation row inside an existing Survey card.
Reopen condition: our own camera-frame-action baseline produces a distinct result worthy of promotion from method row to project.
